string.name: settings_reader_image_scaling_quality_hint
string.value: Controls downscaling interpolation. Optimized uses Mipmap for halftone artwork.

string.name: settings_reader_super_resolution_details_espcn
string.value: Traits: Lightweight luminance enhancement. Pros: Very fast and tiny. Cons: Limited detail gains; color texture mostly uses conventional scaling.

string.name: settings_reader_super_resolution_details_waifu2x_photo
string.value: Traits: Denoising upscale for photos and scans. Pros: Stable noise reduction and relatively fast. Cons: Fine textures may be softened.

string.name: settings_reader_super_resolution_details_waifu2x_art
string.value: Traits: Enhancement for comics, illustrations, and line art. Pros: Clear lines and fast processing. Cons: Photos and complex textures may look oversharpened.

string.name: settings_reader_super_resolution_details_waifu2x_cunet
string.value: Traits: Detail and denoising for comics. Pros: Strong line-art detail. Cons: Performance varies widely; some devices fall back to general compute.

string.name: settings_reader_super_resolution_details_realcugan
string.value: Traits: Conservative comic restoration. Pros: Stable lines with less oversharpening. Cons: Subtle enhancement and less suitable for photos.

string.name: settings_reader_super_resolution_details_animevideov3
string.value: Traits: Lightweight animation and comic enhancement. Pros: Small model with natural lines. Cons: NPU is not currently used, so processing is slower.

string.name: settings_reader_super_resolution_details_realesrgan_x2plus
string.value: Traits: General enhancement for photos and complex textures. Pros: Strong detail recovery. Cons: Large and slower; regular halftones may be flattened as noise and create visible tile differences.

string.name: settings_reader_super_resolution_tiling_limit_description
string.value: Regular halftones, repeating noise, or areas without line references may be smoothed at different strengths by adjacent tiles, producing visible tile differences.

string.name: settings_reader_super_resolution_max_height_hint
string.value: Only images at or below this height are enlarged.

string.name: settings_reader_volume_key_hint
string.value: Use volume down/up for next/previous page
